products.name: Pure Radiance
products.description:
Pure Radiance – $195

A gentle yet revitalising ritual to refresh the mind, body, and skin—perfect for a moment of self-care.

  • Head Massage (Champi) & Foot Soak – 15 min – A combined ritual of a traditional Indian head massage focusing on pressure points to relieve stress, improve circulation, and calm the mind, paired with a soothing foot soak and gentle foot massage to ease fatigue, restore balance, and deeply relax the body.
  • Ayurvedic Facial – 60 min – A nourishing herbal facial to deeply cleanse, hydrate, and enhance the skin’s natural radiance.

Duration: 90 minutes

products.name: Inner Calm
products.description:
Inner Calm – $395

A heart-centered healing experience to release emotional tension and invite deep inner stillness.

  • Abhyanga Full Body Massage – 60 min – A calming and restorative massage that supports detoxification and deeply relaxes the body.
  • Foot Soak – 15 min – A soothing ritual to ease tension, support detoxification, and bring lightness to tired feet.
  • Heart Basti – 30 min – A deeply therapeutic treatment where warm herbal oil is held over the heart center, helping to release stored emotions, ease stress, and nurture emotional balance.

Duration: 105 minutes

products.name: Summer Detox Flow
products.short_description: Give someone the gift of authentic Ayurveda!
products.description:
A deeply therapeutic and rejuvenating treatment using warm herbal oil and a muslin pouch filled with healing botanicals tailored to your body’s needs. The journey begins with a relaxing head, neck, and shoulder massage, followed by a full-body treatment as the heated herbal poultice is gently applied to relieve tension and inflammation. This potent combination helps open the pores, releasing toxins and allowing nutrients to re-enter the skin, leaving you grounded, restored, and deeply calm.

Benefits Include:

  • Supports the body’s detoxification process
  • Helps reduce pain and soothe inflammation
  • Enhances circulation and blood flow
  • Deeply relaxes both body and mind
  • Restores vitality and youthful radiance
  • Tones and nourishes the skin
  • Inspires mental clarity and creativity
  • Encourages restful, restorative sleep

A beautiful starting point for anyone needing therapeutic comfort, detox support, and profound relaxation.

Duration: 60 mins + 30 mins Complimentary Sound Therapy

products.name: Seasonal Rest Ritual
products.description:
When the body is ready, the mind follows.

Building on the grounding effects of Abhyanga, this treatment adds Shirodhara — a continuous flow of warm oil over the forehead that quiets the mind and soothes the nervous system. Finally, a gentle Ayurvedic steam therapy completes the experience. The steam helps open the pores, allowing the body to naturally release toxins and impurities while promoting circulation and deep tissue relaxation. Combined with the warming herbal aroma, this step encourages detoxification, calms Vata imbalances, and enhances the absorption of nutrients back into the skin.

It’s a meditative experience that brings deep mental peace and emotional clarity.

Benefits:

  • Helps overcome stress and calms the nervous system
  • Supports detoxification and toxin release through the skin
  • Helps combat insomnia, anxiety, and chronic headaches
  • Re-ignites mental creativity
  • Invigorates the body and mind
  • Improves memory and mental clarity
  • Rejuvenates the face and softens worry lines
  • Opens the third eye
  • Increases spiritual awareness

Ideal for those needing stress relief, emotional release, and mental rest.

Duration: 45 mins + 30 mins + 15 mins + 30 mins Complimentary Sound Therapy

products.name: Radiant Detox Facial
products.description:
Balance meets beauty — inside and out.

After the body and mind are harmonised, this stage invites outward radiance.

Combining the full-body warmth of Abhyanga with a rejuvenating Ayurvedic facial, it nourishes the skin, improves glow, and enhances the sense of self-love and confidence.

  • Quick and easy way to manage stress
  • Detoxifies the face
  • Aids lymphatic drainage
  • Eliminates imperfections
  • Revitalises the skin, helping it to retain that youthful look
  • Aids blood circulation
  • Removes dead skin cells

Perfect for gifting someone who deserves to feel pampered, restored, and luminous.

Duration:  60 mins + 60 mins + 30 mins Complimentary Sound Therapy

products.name: Heart Renewal Ritual
products.description:
The final chapter — emotional renewal and inner harmony.

This advanced therapy begins with the grounding ritual of Abhyanga, followed by Heart Basti — a gentle warm oil treatment placed over the heart centre (Anahata chakra).
 It nourishes the emotional body, calms anxiety, and opens the heart to love and peace.

Benefits:

  • Helps in respiratory diseases
  • Energizes the heart
  • relieves stress and anxiety
  • Balances Vata Dosha
  • Promotes youthfulness and vitality
  • Rejuvenates the skin
  • Increases stamina
  • Promotes deep and restful sleep

A truly special gift for those seeking emotional healing, deep rest, and spiritual renewal.

Duration: 60 mins + 30 mins + 30 mins Complimentary Sound Therapy

products.name: Strong and Serene Package
products.description:
A sanctuary for the weary soul of every father—where the weight of pain and fatigue becomes but a fleeting shadow in the luminous sun of rejuvenation.

– Abhyanga (60 min) – A deeply relaxing, meditative massage with warm herbal oils, easing tension while restoring vitality.
– Kizhi (30 min) – A powerful herbal pouch massage to melt away aches, pains, and stress, while encouraging natural detoxification.
– Complimentary Gandharva Sound Therapy (30 min) – A serene meditation journey with ancient healing music and detoxifying herbal tea, nurturing mind, body, and spirit.

Other benefits include:

  • Soothes the nervous system
  • Melts away deep-seated tension
  • Targets physical discomfort
  • Promotes the release of aches and stiffness
  • Aids in mental grounding and clarity
  • Helps reset both body and mind

Treatment time = 60 min + 30 min + 30 min Complimentary Sound Therapy

products.name: Blissful Escape Couples Massage
products.description:
Blissful Escape Couples Massage – $895

Treatments –

  • 45 min Abhyanga full body Massage – with 150mls of hot herbal oils– For Fatigue, Stress, Anxiety and Tension. Deeply relaxing and meditative with long lasting benefits. This is a gentle but firm Ayurvedic massage from head to toe, assisting circulation and relaxation.
  • 15 mins Champi Head & Shoulder Massage – Instant stress buster. Uses warm herbal oil to treat the crown, forehead and numerous pressure points, relaxing the mind and nervous system.
  • 15 mins Foot Massage – A relaxing Ayurvedic stress relief technique, helps improve circulation and promotes relaxation.
  • 30 mins Shirodhara – A steady stream of two liters of warm herbal oil is poured slowly and gently over the third eye. This combination balances the chakras & nervous system and provides great benefit for stress and balances the body.
  • 30mins Heart Basti – It is an Ayurvedic treatment for the heart, both the physical heart and the emotional heart. In this treatment warm medicated herbal oil is retained within a specially formed dough ring over the area of the heart chakra. This treatment opens the heart chakra and fosters a deep sense of emotional connection. It’s the perfect way to invite more love, compassion, and joy into your life and relationships.
  • 30 mins complimentary in the meditation room – Ancient healing music called Gandharva is played whilst you relax and sip a delicious detox herbal tea, completing the transformative sensory experience

products.name: Ayurvedic Signature Massage Package
products.short_description: Give someone the gift of Authentic Ayurveda.
products.description:
Ayurvedic Signature Massage:

“In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you” – Deepak Chopra 

Indulge yourself or a loved one with an Aayurvedic Signature Massage. This is a 90 minute package that includes Abhyanga body massage, a warm bath foot soak, herbal oil head massage  and a sound therapy session with a herbal tea in our relaxation room. The multi layered nature of this treatment is specifically formulated to nourish the body mind and soul, bringing multiple therapeutic benefits, restoring balance and wholeness.

This offer is available with gift vouchers valid  for 12 months from date of purchase.

Ayurvedic Wellness Centre is located in the heart of Bondi Junction. Call Us to book at 02 9389 2581

Our Customer Reviews on TripAdvisor

“ I had an Abhyanga treatment recently and I left feeling more relaxed and energised than I can remember feeling! The staff were lovely, the therapists very professional.”

products.short_description: Give someone the gift of Authentic Ayurveda.
products.description:
Vitality Balance Package

In Vitality Balance Package, starting with a Indian head massage, which focuses on the chakra points for maximum relaxation and stress relief, this package is sure to leave you on a high note. After Abhyanga full body massage treatment, where herbal oils are massaged into the skin, you are indulged with our Udvartana herbal scrub treatment. Ayurvedic herbal scrub powder helps to tone your body and promote weight loss. The treatment works to reduce cellulite and detoxify bodily impurities. After this, our sound therapy room is where you’ll deeply connect with your inner self whilst you are served detox herbal Ayurvedic tea and relax with traditional Gandharva healing music.

Benefits: Weight reduction, body toning, vitality and deep relaxation.

Treatments: Abhyanga Full Body Massage 30 minutes, Udvartana 30 minutes, Champi Head Massage 15 minutes, Music Therapy 30 minutes.

1 hour 45 minutes

products.name: Relax Package
products.description:
Relax Package

This package begins with Champi, Indian head massage, and using special Ayurvedic herbal oils chosen to nourish the hair and the scalp. This treatment focuses on the chakra points to help relieve stress and ensure maximum relaxation. After this, your body is nurtured and indulged with our Abhyanga full body massage. This massage promotes the penetration of essential oils deep into the skin. This is followed by sound therapy when ancient Gandharva healing music is played, as you relax and sip our authentic Ayurvedic detox herbal tea. Soothes the mind and nourishes the body.

Benefits: Relaxes and invigorates the body and mind.

Treatments: Champi Head Massage – 15 minutes, Abhyanga Full Body Massage –  45 minutes, Music Therapy-  30 minutes

Duration of the Relaxation Massage treatment:  1 hour +30 minutes Sound Therapy –  $175

products.name: Pure Bliss Package
products.short_description: Give someone the gift of Authentic Ayurveda.
products.description:
Pure Bliss Package: Rejuvenate and Revitalise 

Pure Bliss Package will start with our authentic Indian head massage, which relaxes the mind and calms the nervous system helping you completely forget your ability to worry about anything. This treatment is followed by our signature treatments Abhyanga full body oleation and deeply relaxing Shirodhara, where a steady stream of two litres of warm and soothing herbal oil is slowly and gently poured over the third eye. To indulge you even further, the next treatment is Udvartana scrub using herbal powders, then followed by the Kizhi herbal pouch massage to help alleviate aches, pains and stress. To top it all off, you enjoy a cup of our organic detox tea in our sound therapy room, as soothing Gandharva music is played in the background. This package is nothing short of pure bliss.

Benefits of Pure Bliss Package: Reduce fatigue and overcome stress. Feel calm, refreshed and energized.

Treatments: Champi Head Massage 15 minutes, Abhyanga Full Body Massage 30 minutes, Shirodhara 30 minutes, Udvartana Scrub 30 minutes, Kizhi 30 minutes, Music Therapy 30 minutes

Duration of the treatment: 2 hours 45 minutes

products.name: Shirodhara Destress Package
products.short_description: Herbal massage with a bliss inducing, stress reducing difference.
products.description:
The Ayurvedic Wellness Centre Deep Relaxation package combines two of the most popular treatments available at the centre;

  • Abhyanga – a form of Ayurvedic massage involving specially formulated warmed herbal oils. Nourishing and revitalising, Abhyanga helps pacify the three doshas or ‘bioenergies’ within the body. This in turn encourages the release of toxins from deep within the tissue and the GI tract so that it can be efficiently eliminated.
  • Shirodhara – Involves 2 litres of specifically formulated herbal oil being poured over the forehead and ‘third eye’ in a constant, gentle stream.
  • Foot massage.
  • Head massage with Brahmi oil.

Cost: $345

Treatment time = 90 min + 30 min sound therapy

products.name: Champi Head and Shoulders – 30 mins – Gift Voucher
products.short_description: Give someone the gift of authentic Ayurveda!
products.description:
Despite its name, Champi therapy involves work on the head, shoulders, neck, scalp and face. In addition, Ayurvedic texts relate certain parts of the head to other body parts and/or symptoms. This means that a Champi Head Massage will not only affect your head, but you may also feel relief and balance spread throughout your body from various different points.

Benefits:

  • Fast relief if short on time
  • Good for balancing the body
  • Nerves in the head that affect the whole body are massaged
  • Ideal for sufferers of fatigue or cramps
  • Helps eliminate infections

Treatment time = 30 min + 15 min sound therapy – $140

To find out more about Champi Treatment, click here.

Please call us or email us to organise your gift voucher!

(02) 9389 2581

info@ayurvedicwellnesscentre.com.au

products.name: Udvartana – Gift Voucher
products.short_description: Give someone the gift of authentic Ayurveda!
products.description:
This deeply invigorating, body-toning treatment is The Ayurvedic Wellness Centre version of a cellulite busting, full body exfoliation. Udvartana pairs a massage with the application of a specially formulated herbal paste that is made up using herbal powders carefully selected by your therapist according to your body type or ‘dosha’. The treatment is designed to stimulate the lymphatic system, smooth away fat deposits and condition the skin.

After being wiped down with hot towels, the treatment is concluded in the specially designed meditation space where guests can sip freshly brewed tea and rest quietly as their body and mind recalibrates after their treatment.

Other benefits:

  • Energising and exfoliating
  • Tightens and tones skin
  • Reduces the appearance of cellulite and stubborn fat deposits
  • Increases lymphatic drainage
  • Increases metabolic rate
  • Rebalances the body
  • Encourages and release of toxins
  • Great for all body types
  • Promotes healthy digestion

Treatment time = 60 min + 30 min sound therapy

To find out more about Udvartana Therapy, click here.

Please call us or email us to organise your gift voucher!
